description: Adjust the elevation datum of the topographic survey dataset located at 'C:\workspace\data\local_datum_survey.csv' by applying a constant Z-shift of exactly +845.32 meters to all points. Ensure X (Easting) and Y (Northing) coordinates remain unchanged. Export the adjusted point list to 'C:\workspace\data\navd88_survey.csv' and save the TopoCal project to 'C:\workspace\data\datum_shift.top'.
